sections.paragraph:
ϰαταφέρω [κατά, φέρω]

—1. bear down, pass., in complex imagery of one experiencing the weight of a burden linked w. implication of drooping eyelids, w. simple dat. ϰαταφερόμενος ὕπνῳ βαϑεῖ gradually succumbing to a deep sleep Ac 20:9a; the aor. ptc. w. ἀπὸ τοῦ ὕπνου indicates collapse brought on by sleep vs. 9b.

—2. bring against, of making incriminating charges Ac 25:7; laying down an opposition vote ϰαταφέρειν ψῆφον cast a ballot against 26:10.
